chinese_news.title: 世界杯官方比赛用球再度“中国制造”：全球产业链迁移下，广东工厂为何仍留在赛场中央？｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
2026年美加墨世界杯进入倒计时，对于普通球迷而言，世界杯意味着绿茵场上的竞争与激情；但对于体育装备制造业来说，这项全球顶级赛事同样是检验供应链实力与技术能力的重要时刻。

2025年10月，阿迪达斯正式发布2026年世界杯官方比赛用球"三重浪（TRIONDA）"。据阿迪达斯方面介绍，这款比赛用球在中国广东的一家代工厂完成生产与检测，每一颗出厂用球均印有"MADE IN CHINA"字样。

值得说明的是，全球足球制造的版图并非由单一地区主导。公开资料显示，巴基斯坦锡亚尔科特一城便生产了全球约七成足球，历届世界杯的大量用球亦出自当地的Forward Sports等代工企业。世界杯用球的供给，实际上是一条多地协同的链条：占绝大多数的复制球、训练球与大众消费产品多集中于锡亚尔科特，而技术含量最高、内嵌传感器的比赛级用球，则有报道与品牌方说法共同指向中国的生产线。

在全球制造业加速向东南亚等地区迁移的背景下，这一分工引发了业内关注：为何技术门槛最高的比赛级用球，仍依托中国的生产体系？这背后映射出的，是中

chinese_news.title: 腾讯汤道生评价姚顺雨、混元 3和元宝
chinese_news.summary:
文｜王毓婵

编辑｜张雨忻

6月5日，腾讯云AI产业应用大会最受外界关注的是什么？

毫无疑问，是汤道生与姚顺雨的对话。

在这场发布了一系列覆盖20多个垂直场景Agent的大会上，因为产品过于To B，也没有提及大家最关注的“微信AI”，导致外界的关注重心几乎全部被那场对话吸引走。

腾讯集团高级执行副总裁、云与智慧产业事业群CEO汤道生，在对谈中问腾讯首席AI科学家、腾讯混元大语言模型及AI Infra负责人姚顺雨，“很多人说腾讯在AI上慢了，你觉得我们真的慢了吗？”

姚顺雨回答说：“感觉应该是我问你的问题。”

姚顺雨随后提到了两个判断标准——1.AI是一个短期游戏还是长期游戏？2.它会是一个线性还是多元游戏？

这位年仅27岁，曾在 OpenAI 工作，被称为“清华天才少年”的姚顺雨加入腾讯已经半年，他的思路几乎就是腾讯AI的思路。他的判断结论是：首先，AI是一个长期游戏，刚刚进入下半场；其次，Coding

chinese_news.title: 改变全球速度的AI，付款却卡在上一个时代
chinese_news.summary:
2026年，全球平均每小时就有一家新的AI公司诞生。 

AI行业的竞争已经白热化到如此程度：大模型的参数在卷，推理速度在卷，应用落地的速度在卷，就连融资PPT的故事密度也在卷。一时间，所有人的目光都盯在“前端”——谁的模型更强，谁的产品先跑出来，谁就能在这场军备竞赛里站稳脚跟。

但在这场喧嚣之外，一个被大多数人忽视的问题，正在悄悄侵蚀每一家AI企业的利润：钱，到底能不能顺畅地流动起来？

当AI企业的采购清单越来越全球化，支付链路的每一个断点，都意味着实实在在的成本损耗和效率内耗。而

chinese_news.title: 产品观察 | 小米创始员工范典创业AI硬件，做了台“无摩擦”的睡眠床头灯
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 邱晓芬

编辑 | 袁斯来

「格物科技」的创始人范典，是当下智能硬件赛道的一个“异类”。

作为喝过小米粥的小米创始员工，范典曾任曾小米物联网平台部总经理、AIoT战略委员会主席。以大厂高管履历拿笔钱，以最短时间做出款硬件上众筹，依托媒体造势，再滚动更多融资是这两年硬件赛道创业很常见的打法。

但范典做第一款产品用了三年。

2024年，智能硬件还是很冷僻的赛道，范典的选择更是小众中的小众。 他没做当时已被市场验证过的AI可穿戴设备、AI床垫，转而做起一个 全新的品类—— AI睡眠床头灯（Sleepal AI Lamp）。

很少人清楚这三年发生了什么。范典几乎不接受采访，也鲜少见投资人。低调也体现在他新公司「格物科技」的融资上。创业三年，他们仅公布了一轮天使轮融资，资方为小米、天际资本等。

直到今年5月19日，Sleepal AI Lamp在海外平台Kickstarter开启众筹，定价为449美金。产品刚上市就被好

chinese_news.title: 「华超神控」获亿元天使系列融资，加速打造新一代AI超声脑机接口平台 | 36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文｜胡香赟

编辑｜海若镜

36氪获悉，近日，新一代AI超声脑机公司华超神控（BCI-Sonics）已完成亿元人民币级天使轮系列融资。天使轮融资由经纬创投领投，天使+轮由德联资本、道远资本联合领投，循光资本持续担任独家财务顾问。募集资金将用于推动公司的技术验证与产业化落地。

华超神控于2025年创立，创始人李昕是中国科学院与德国弗劳恩霍夫IGD研究所联合培养生物医学工程博士，曾任GE医疗全球科研中心中国区负责人，并连续创立创新科技及医疗公司，在医疗影像、AI、脑机接口与产业转化方面拥有深厚积累。

公司核心团队汇聚了来自清华大学、上海交通大学、帝国理工等海内外高校的人才，覆盖神经科学、声学、医学影像、人工智能等多个方向，兼具研发与产业经验，熟悉医疗器械从原理样机、工程样机、临床验证到注册转化的完整路径。

据了解，华超神控团队在创业前已就超声脑机接口技术方向的产业确定性达成共识，属于“先有团队、目标、技术积累和临床判断，再走向创业和融资”。

TOP3大新闻

八家上市公司集中公告“补税” 

6月1日至6日，不到一周内，八家A股上市公司先后披露补缴税款公告。这八家公司合计补缴税款及滞纳金约4亿元。其中，苹果中国最大授权经销商爱施德（002416.SZ）一家补缴3.08亿元，占八家总额的近八成，该公司披露，仅滞纳金就达1.23亿元。对部分公司而言，这笔补缴金额已接近甚至超过去年一整年的利润。如电子材料企业宏昌电子（603002.SH）需补缴4041.91万元，而公司2025年全年归母净利润为3537.17万元。

八家公司公告的核心表述一致——均已全部缴纳完毕，均不涉及行政处罚，均引用《企业会计准则第28号》认定不属于前期会

chinese_news.title: 9点1氪｜豆包推出付费后月活减少610万；Anthropic呼吁全球放缓AI开发，警告AI“自我改进”风险；罗永浩卸任锤子软件公司执行董事

二手房挂牌量回落新房库存下降，楼市供需关系向好

B站宣布启动AI创造公开赛

TOP3大新闻

数据显示，豆包推出付费后月活减少610万 

据全球人工智能市场追踪机构Aicpb.com周三发布的数据显示，在豆包推出订阅选项后，该应用5月份的月活跃用户（MAU）减少了610万，这是自2023年推出以来该应用罕见的下滑。Aicpb.com创始人李邦竹表示：“中国的免费人工智能服务时代还远未结束，所以豆包的商业化可能确实为时过早。” 

有分析人士认为，字节跳动过早地将盈利模式商业化，可能会使其在中国竞争激烈的消费人工智能市场中失去领先地位。此前，其旗舰聊天机器人豆包在试水付费订阅模式后流失了数百万用户。（南华早报）

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $65,000 by July 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC tumbled on macro headwinds (rising inflation, tech fears, Middle East volatility); $60K support is contested, but institutional buyers (Strategy, Bitmine) are accumulating—classic capitulation-buy setup.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk, Cointelegraph (BTC support pressure vs. large accumulation trades)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Strait of Hormuz reopen for oil transit before December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Traders just moved from 60% probability of reopening before Aug to higher odds of 2027+; this is a directional repricing of geopolitical risk after Iran-Israel strikes resumed.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (trader commentary on Strait of Hormuz traffic normalization timeline)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Spot Bitcoin ETF flows turn positive (cumulative inflows) by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Spot BTC ETFs bleeding $1.7B with a four-week outflow streak; oversold signal often precedes institutional re-entry, especially if BTC stabilizes above $62K.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (ETF outflow tracking); CoinDesk (institutional accumulation by Strategy, Bitmine)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will NVDA (Nvidia) stock finish Q2 2026 (June 30) up >10% from May 5 close?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Chip stocks rebounding Monday; traders debate whether the rebound is real or a sucker's rally, but Huang's visit to SK Haikel and GPU demand signals warrant attention.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (chip rebound, Mike Khouw protection buying); 36Kr (黄仁勋 SK Haikel collaboration)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the U.S. Fed keep rates steady (no cuts) through August 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: New York Fed survey shows household financial worry at July 2022 highs and deteriorating condition perception; inflation outlook stable, but labor/credit data could delay rate cuts.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (NY Fed household survey, inflation outlook)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will global oil price (WTI crude) average above $75/barrel in Q3 2026 (July–September)?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) weekly spot price data; average of published spot prices.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Strait of Hormuz disruption risk is priced for 2027 reopening, not Q3 2026 supply shock; traders underestimate persistence of Iranian-Israeli tensions.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Iran-Israel strike exchange, Strait of Hormuz closure extending beyond June forecast.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum close above $2,200 on at least 20 trading days in Q2 2026 (April 1–June 30)?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or Kraken daily ETHUSD close prices; count trading days above threshold.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: ETH weakness vs. BTC accumulation, but AI hardware cycle (Huang partnerships, GPU demand) could reignite layer-1 dapp activity.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: MetaMask AI agent wallet adoption surge; enterprise Ethereum usage announcements.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the U.S. House pass a government funding bill including the $70B ICE/CBP measure before June 15, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Congress.gov roll-call vote; resolution on passage of any bill containing the $70B border/immigration spending.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Expected vote 'this week' (per CNBC as of May 5) suggests imminent passage; market underestimates Trump-aligned Congress speed.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: House scheduling announcement; bipartisan support signals.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin's realized price (7-day moving average) fall below $55,000 before July 1, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CryptoQuant or on-chain analytics realized price feed; resolution if 7-day MA dips below $55K on any day.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: BTC ETF outflows + macro headwinds suggest further downside, but institutional buying (Strategy 1,550 BTC purchase) signals floor around $58–60K.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Sustained BTC closes below $60K for 3+ days; further Fed hawkish signals.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Sam Bankman-Fried receive a presidential pardon or commutation from Trump before December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official White House statement or legal filing confirming pardon/commutation; resolution on announcement date.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: SBF's formal pardon request to Trump (per CoinDesk) + Trump's crypto-friendly positioning + 2026 midterms context; crypto community underestimates political momentum.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: SBF pardon formal request submission; Trump public statements on crypto/SBF.

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin accumulation by large holders (Strategy, Bitmine) during ETF outflows signals capitulation buy; long BTC spot/perps with 12-week horizon targeting $70–75K.
supporting_signals: Strategy purchased 1,550 BTC after selling $2.5M last week (tactical dip-buy signal).
Bitmine made largest Ethereum purchase of 2026 as prices fell (institutional conviction).
Spot BTC ETF outflows ($1.7B, 4-week streak) often precede bottoms when whale accumulation rises.
investment_theses.counter_view: Macro headwinds (rising inflation, Strait of Hormuz closure, geopolitical risk) could drive further BTC weakness to $50K; Fed keeps rates higher for longer.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot (via Coinbase, Kraken) or 3-month BTC perps (Deribit, Hyperliquid); 2x leverage if risk tolerance supports.

investment_theses.thesis: Energy/oil supply shock from extended Strait of Hormuz closure drives WTI >$80 by Q3; long XLE (energy ETF) or crude oil futures with 8-week entry.
supporting_signals: CNBC reports traders now see higher probability of Strait remaining closed beyond 2026 (vs. 60% pre-August reopening 2 weeks ago).
Iran-Israel strike exchange (May 5) shows escalation risk remains despite 'ceasefire'; geopolitical tail risk is mispriced.
U.S. energy independence thesis doesn't eliminate global supply shock transmission to WTI.
investment_theses.counter_view: OPEC+ production cuts are offset by U.S. shale surge; demand destruction (recession risk, EV adoption) caps oil upside at $70–72.
investment_theses.expression: Long XLE (energy sector ETF) or USO (crude oil ETF); or direct long crude oil futures (NYMEX WTI Sep 2026 contract).

investment_theses.thesis: Institutional distrust of U.S. fiscal stability (household worry at 4-year highs per NY Fed) drives flight to gold and USDC yield; long GLD or short DXY into June.
supporting_signals: NY Fed household financial worry index at July 2022 highs; condition perception deteriorating despite stable inflation outlook.
Congress moving $70B border funding (fiscal pressure signal); long-term deficit trajectory worsening.
Gold historically rallies when real yields compress and household confidence falters.
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed remains hawkish on rates (no summer cuts likely); real yields stay positive, limiting gold upside to $2,400–$2,450/oz.
investment_theses.expression: Long GLD (gold ETF) with 6-week horizon; alternatively, long gold futures (COMEX GC) or short DXY (dollar index) if macro setup confirms.

investment_theses.thesis: Chip sector (NVDA, MU, ASML) rebounding Monday, but protection-buying demand (per Mike Khouw) signals traders expect pullback; short tech (QQQ) with 4-week horizon on any >3% rally.
supporting_signals: Chip rebound is 'real' but traders buying downside protection suggests conviction is fragile.
Tech fears remain post-May selloff; no major catalyst (earnings, Fed clarity) to sustain rally yet.
Huang's GPU-for-gaming comments are niche; enterprise AI adoption momentum less clear this week.
investment_theses.counter_view: Chip shortage recovery + AI capex cycle (Huang-SK Haikel collaboration) could drive NVDA to new highs; consensus too bearish.
investment_theses.expression: Short QQQ (Nasdaq ETF) or short NVDA calls (sell 1-month OTM calls) if IV rises; pair with long SPY to isolate sector risk.

investment_theses.thesis: SBF pardon momentum (formal request filed) + Trump crypto alignment suggest crypto regulatory tailwind; long major L1 tokens (ETH, SOL, AVAX) with 16-week horizon.
supporting_signals: SBF filed formal pardon request to Trump (per CoinDesk, May 5); crypto community largely priced this out pre-request.
Trump has positioned himself as crypto-friendly (Bitcoin accumulation narrative, opposition to harsh SEC rules).
EU compliance burden (Ledger CTO comments) makes U.S. regulatory clarity a competitive advantage for crypto platforms.
investment_theses.counter_view: Pardon unlikely to pass legal/political muster; Trump's crypto support is performative; regulatory crackdown resumes post-midterms.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH, SOL, AVAX spot (equal weight) via Coinbase; or long altcoin index (e.g., DeFi sector basket on Uniswap or via CME micro futures if available).
